name: skills-marketplace
description: A plugin that bundles six focused engineering workflow skills.

interface.shortDescription: Six focused skills for analysis, planning, build, test, and review.
interface.longDescription: A local marketplace-style plugin that splits engineering work into six focused skills: code analysis, solution planning, frontend implementation, backend implementation, UI testing, and code review.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this code path and tell me the conclusion with evidence.
Turn this requirement into a concrete implementation plan in markdown.
Review this patch and return severity-ranked findings with a final conclusion.
